creator: stefan@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Joseph,

please note that a problem report (ports/127302 [1]) for a port you're
maintaining, security/swatch, has been around for a while. Can you have a
look at it and send a followup with a comment on it so we know what the
state of this is?

Thanks and regards,
Stefan

[1]: http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/127302
